evals.name: Bookkeeping 5x offer
evals.prompt: I run a small bookkeeping firm, help me build an offer I can charge 5x for
evals.expected_output: A Grand Slam Offer workshop output that identifies a starving-crowd market, applies the value equation, names a guarantee, and produces a pricing/stack structure for a bookkeeping firm.
expectations: The output identifies a specific starving-crowd target avatar (not just 'business owners') for the bookkeeping offer.
The output references the value equation explicitly (Dream Outcome x Perceived Likelihood of Achievement / (Time Delay x Effort & Sacrifice)).
The output produces a named guarantee with a vivid name and a concrete promise.
The output includes a pricing stack or tiered offer structure with at least one price point that is 5x or more above typical bookkeeping fees.

evals.name: Fitness coach high-ticket offer
evals.prompt: I'm a fitness coach for busy executives. Help me design a high-ticket offer they can't say no to.
evals.expected_output: A Grand Slam Offer workshop output that names the executive avatar, applies scarcity/urgency/exclusivity, produces a guarantee, and structures a premium offer with bonuses and a delivery cube.
expectations: The output names a specific high-ticket avatar (busy executives / C-suite / high-performers) and their acute pain.
The output applies at least one of urgency, scarcity, or exclusivity to the offer.
The output produces a named guarantee with a concrete risk reversal or results promise.
The output structures the offer with a core service plus at least one bonus or premium component stacked into a high-ticket price.
